assertionResults.reason: Scoped cache eviction behavior is confirmed by passing tests read_cache::tests::evict_channel_removes_only_matching_channel_snapshot_entries and read_cache::tests::evict_channel_does_not_affect_workspace_bootstrap_for_other_channels.

Only semaphore bound was verifiable locally (db::videos::tests::max_concurrent_s3_ops_is_within_cloud_run_bounds passed). Parallel S3 behavior tests db::videos::tests::load_all_parallel_returns_correct_results and db::videos::tests::bulk_insert_parallel_returns_inserted_count failed with S3 dispatch errors, so full assertion validation could not be completed in this environment.
Targeted test db::videos::tests::get_video_without_summary_skips_summary_fetch could not be validated due to S3 dispatch failure during setup (insert should succeed).
Targeted test db::videos::tests::channel_snapshot_loads_video_data_once could not be validated due to S3 dispatch failure during setup (insert channel).

frictions.description: Relevant backend assertions rely on ignored integration tests that require reachable S3; these are not self-contained unit tests in this environment.

blockers.description: S3-backed ignored tests fail with dispatch failure, preventing runtime validation of parallel load/insert and summary/snapshot integration behavior.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried each targeted ignored cargo test and captured full stdout/stderr; failures remained reproducible.
